chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No. 511 of 2024. Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case. 1. For Orders on CMA No. 3230/2024 (Urgent) 2. For Orders on CMA No. 3201/2024 (Exp) 3. For hearing of Main Case. 4. For Orders on CMA No. 3202/2024 (Stay) -------------- 19.12.2024. Mr. Muneer Ahmed, Advocate for Appellant. --------------- 1. Granted. 2 to 4. When confronted with the second paragraph of the impugned order through which the Appellant is aggrieved, Counsel does not press this appeal with pending applications. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
